Book Now

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2026

Who We Are

Sunflower House is an esports training facility located near Lisbon, Portugal. Our website is sunflower.gg. You can contact us at contact@sunflower.gg.

What Data We Collect

When you submit a booking request via our contact form, we collect:

  • Your name and the name of your team or organization
  • Your email address
  • Requested dates and booking preferences
  • Any additional notes you provide

We do not collect any data through cookies beyond what is strictly necessary to run this site.

How We Use Your Data

We use the information you submit solely to respond to your booking enquiry. We do not sell, share, or use your data for marketing purposes.

Data Storage

Booking form submissions are processed by Web3Forms and delivered to our inbox. We retain enquiry emails for up to 12 months.

Cookies

This website uses a single functional cookie to remember that you have accepted this privacy notice. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

Your Rights

Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, or delete personal data we hold about you. To exercise these rights, email us at contact@sunflower.gg.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. The date at the top of this page shows when it was last revised.

Sunflower House
© 2026 Sunflower Gaming Facility. All rights reserved.
